title: Dancing Baby
description: One of the first viral internet phenomena featuring a 3D rendered dancing baby.

title: Hampster Dance
description: Animated hamsters dancing to a sped-up version of 'Whistle Stop' from Robin Hood.

title: All Your Base
description: Classic gaming meme from the intro of Zero Wing with hilariously bad translation.

title: Badger Badger Badger
description: Hypnotic animated loop of badgers, mushrooms, and a snake.

title: Chocolate Rain
description: Tay Zonday's viral song with unexpectedly deep voice and social commentary.

title: LOLcats
description: Cats with funny captions in broken English - 'I Can Has Cheezburger?'

title: Rickroll
description: Internet prank involving Rick Astley's 'Never Gonna Give You Up'.

title: Dramatic Chipmunk
description: 5-second clip of a prairie dog turning dramatically to the camera.

title: Rage Comics
description: Simple stick figure comics expressing everyday frustrations and emotions.

title: Keyboard Cat
description: Cat appearing to play an electronic keyboard, used as a 'play off' for fails.

title: Double Rainbow
description: Man's emotional reaction to seeing a double rainbow in Yosemite.

title: Nyan Cat
description: Pop-Tart cat flying through space leaving a rainbow trail.

title: Gangnam Style
description: PSY's viral K-pop hit with the iconic invisible horse dance.

title: Harlem Shake
description: Dance meme where people go wild when the bass drops.

title: Doge
description: Shiba Inu dog with colorful Comic Sans phrases - 'much wow, very doge'.
